summary: Tested Food Items Approval System - Backend APIs and Admin Dashboard UI. All backend APIs working correctly (14/14 tests passed). Admin dashboard shows new 3-icon layout with pending approvals summary. PendingFoodItemsTab component working correctly with stats, refresh button, and empty state.

GET_pending_food_items.notes: Returns list of pending food items with store info

POST_approve_food_item.notes: Approves item and sends notification to seller

POST_reject_food_item.notes: Rejects item with optional reason, deletes item, sends notification

POST_create_food_item.notes: Creates item with is_approved: false by default

3_icon_layout.notes: Dashboard shows 3 main summary icons: طلبات الانضمام, العناصر المعلقة, طلبات السحب

join_requests_icon.notes: Combines sellers + drivers + food stores counts

quick_links.notes: 5 quick links: بائعين, سائقين, متاجر, منتجات, أطباق

empty_state.notes: Shows 'لا يوجد أطباق في انتظار الموافقة' when no pending items

seed_data_creation: Created test food items during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Food items approval system fully tested. Backend APIs: GET /api/admin/food-items/pending, GET /api/admin/food-items/stats, POST /api/admin/food-items/{id}/approve, POST /api/admin/food-items/{id}/reject all working. Frontend: Admin dashboard has 3-icon layout, PendingFoodItemsTab component working with stats and empty state. Food items created via POST /api/food/items have is_approved: false by default.
